# Handoff Prompt

Use this prompt with any compatible agent:

> Use the `/content-burst-publishing` skill for this repository. Keep publishing in validated bursts: mine `idea4blog.md` for the next themes, draft multiple posts under `_posts/`, update the public ledger, extend `tests/test_site.py`, run `python3 -m unittest -v tests.test_site`, publish to the public repo, verify the live GitHub Pages deployment, and then continue with the next adjacent burst until I tell you to stop.

## Short version

> Use `/content-burst-publishing` and keep pumping.
